titleStmt.title: SII 34.69: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 69. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja-Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I), 22nd year, Dhanus, sudi 9, Monday, Rēvati = A.D. 1006, December 2, Monday.

The mahāsabhā of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam in Rājēndrasimha-vaḷanāḍu gifted red lotuses (cheṅgaḻunīr pū) from all the tanks and ponds in their village for offering to the deity in the Mahādēva temple of Tirunallūr daily during the month of Dhanus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOla perunilac celviyum taṉakkEyurimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷa kāntaḷūr cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi vEṅkai
nāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭaka malaināṭum kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicaipukaḻtara lī
ḻamaṇṭalamuṅ Iraṭṭapāṭi yēḻarai yilakkamu tiṇṭiṟal venṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa tanneḻil vaḷarḷūḻiyuḷ ḷellāyāṇ
ṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭēy ceḻiyarait tēcukoḷ śrīkōrājarāja kēsari panmarākiya śrīkōrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Āvatu rājē
ntrasimha vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattuk kāmaravalli caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyōm Ivvāṭṭai dhanu nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa
ttu navamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Irēvati nāḷ tirunallūr mahādevar tirumaṇṭapattu kūṭṭam kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu sabhāvyava
stai paṇṇinapaṭi I mahātEvar dhanu nāyaṟṟu Utsavamum nittapaṭiyum ceṅkaḻunīr pūccātta Ūrilum piṭākaikaḷilum Oḻukil Ellā kuḷaṅkaḷum Oṭaikaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa nīr ni
lai Ellām kuṭuttō mahāsabhaiyōm sabhai Uḷḷiruntu paṇittār cōḻamādeviccērikku Ātaṉūr parama bhaṭṭar paṇiyālum Avanigandhar vaccērikku kuḻuppirāl bhavasvāmi bhaṭṭar paṇiyālum rājakēcari cērikku pūvaṇṭūr Ejña mūtti bhaṭṭar paṇiyālum kāmaravallic cērikku tirunalūr candrabhūṣaṇabhaṭṭar paṇiyālum sabhāvyavasthai Eḻutinēn maddhyasdhan dharmmappiriya neḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
